prTitle: fix(workflow): avoid root auto-commit during stale-marker milestone recovery (closes #88)
prBody:
Ports gsd-pi `494e759` (fix-strategy: adapted-port) to otto-cli. Closes #88.

## Problem
When `mergeCompletedMilestone` hits a **stale worktree marker dir** (a session-status marker directory that exists on disk but is *not* a registered git worktree), the standalone merge previously fell back to the project root while still routing through **worktree mode**. From the project root, `mergeMilestoneToMain` would auto-commit overlapping root files to the integration branch before the squash merge, fabricating a synthetic conflict.

## Fix
Adds a structural `isolationModeOverride?: "branch"` knob to `MergeContext` and threads it through the mode selection in `mergeMilestoneStandalone`:
- `parallel-merge.ts` passes `isolationModeOverride: "branch"` whenever there is no registered git worktree, so stale-marker recovery merges through **branch mode** from the project root instead of worktree mode.
- `worktree-lifecycle.ts` honours the override before `getIsolationMode` auto-detection, and suppresses the `#2625` in-worktree override when branch mode is forced (so a project-root path is never routed through worktree mode).

## Gates (run in lane worktree)
- Regression test (`mergeCompletedMilestone ã stale worktree marker does not auto-commit dirty root overlap`): fails before, passes after.
- Build: pass
- Targeted suite: pass
- Full suite (`verify:pr` + `npm test`): pass
- Independent reviewer: approve

Severity, labels, > conflict-risk, and the otto-cli implementation guidance below are populated > so the implementation phase can **confirm and apply** rather than start from > scratch. Pick this up via `/upstream-port-from-issue {{N}}` when ready. ## otto-cli implementation guidance verdict: manual-port # 494e759 ã fix: avoid root auto-commit during milestone recovery ## Target file(s) - src/resources/extensions/workflow/parallel-merge.ts - src/resources/extensions/workflow/tests/integration/parallel-merge.test.ts ## Divergence gsd-pi's fix adds an `isolationModeOverride` knob to `mergeCompletedMilestone`: when no registered worktree exists (stale marker dir), pass `isolationModeOverride: "branch"` to the standalone-merge call instead of letting worktree-mode run from the project root (which can auto-commit root overlap into the integration branch). Otto's `parallel-merge.ts` `mergeCompletedMilestone` (line 149) already has `const registeredWtPath = getAutoWorktreePath(basePath, milestoneId); const worktreeBasePath = registeredWtPath ?? basePath;` ã the same precondition gsd-pi was using. The fork-baseline question is whether otto's standalone-merge function accepts an `isolationModeOverride` parameter, and whether worktree-mode-from-project-root has the same auto-commit hazard otto saw. ## Concrete edits 1. Read otto's `parallel-merge.ts` around line 149-180 and confirm the `mergeStandalone` (or equivalent) call signature. If it accepts an `isolationModeOverride` (or similar branch-mode hint), add the gsd-pi pattern: ```ts const isolationModeOverride = registeredWtPath ? undefined : "branch"; // ... await mergeStandalone({ ..., isolationModeOverride }); ``` 2. If otto's standalone-merge does not accept such a knob, port both: add the parameter to the standalone-merge function signature and route it through to the isolation-mode selection, then apply the parallel-merge change. This is a deeper structural port. 3. Update the comment block above `const registeredWtPath` to mirror the corrected reasoning (recovery through branch mode, not worktree mode from project root). 4. Port the new integration test `mergeCompletedMilestone ã stale worktree marker does not auto-commit dirty root overlap` from `tests/integration/parallel-merge.test.ts`. The test's path strings (`/.gsd/worktrees/...`) must be renamed to `/.otto/workflow/worktrees/...` (or whatever otto's projection layout is ã verify against `setupWorktreeIsolation` in otto's test helpers). ## Verdict Worth porting. The bug ã recovery from a stale worktree marker auto-commits overlapping files in the project root before the milestone squash-merge, fabricating phantom conflicts ã is exactly the kind of multi-milestone correctness issue otto should care about, and otto's parallel-merge already shares the same architecture (registered-vs-stale worktree detection). The structural port for the override knob takes effort but is bounded; the test rename is mechanical.

Only use the worktree path when git actually knows // about it (`getAutoWorktreePath` returns non-null). When the directory // exists on disk but isn't a registered git worktree (e.g. a stale - // session-status marker dir), fall back to the project root and let the - // standalone's mode detection pick branch-mode or skipped ã using the - // un-registered dir as `worktreeBasePath` would cause `getCurrentBranch` - // to fail with a "Worktree HEAD diverged" error. + // session-status marker dir), recover through branch mode from the project + // root. Letting worktree-mode run from the project root can auto-commit + // overlapping root files to the integration branch before the squash merge, + // creating a synthetic conflict. const registeredWtPath = getAutoWorktreePath(basePath, milestoneId); const worktreeBasePath = registeredWtPath ?? basePath; + const isolationModeOverride = registeredWtPath ? undefined : "branch"; let result: MergeStandaloneResult; try { @@ -167,6 +168,7 @@ export async function mergeCompletedMilestone( originalBasePath: basePath, worktreeBasePath, milestoneId, + isolationModeOverride, // Parallel context never runs with degraded isolation ã workers only // exist when isolation succeeded. Pass `false` explicitly so the // standalone's degraded-skip branch is not reached. diff --git a/src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/integration/parallel-merge.test.ts b/src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/integration/parallel-merge.test.ts index b15da1a..f41655c 100644 --- a/src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/integration/parallel-merge.test.ts +++ b/src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/integration/parallel-merge.test.ts @@ -370,6 +370,49 @@ test("mergeCompletedMilestone ã synthesizes roadmap from DB when projection is } }); +test("mergeCompletedMilestone ã stale worktree marker does not auto-commit dirty root overlap", async () => { + const savedCwd = process.cwd(); + const repo = createTempRepo(); + + try { + setupWorktreeIsolation(repo); + setupRoadmap(repo, "M011", "Dirty Root Recovery", ["S01: App shell"]); + + createMilestoneBranch(repo, "M011", [ + { name: "index.html", content: "

M011

\n" }, + ]); + + // Stale marker without a registered git worktree. Recovery must not treat + // the project root as a worktree and auto-commit this overlapping file to + // main before attempting the milestone merge. + mkdirSync(join(repo, ".gsd", "worktrees", "M011", ".gsd"), { recursive: true }); + writeFileSync(join(repo, "index.html"), "

local root draft

\n"); + + process.chdir(repo); + const result = await mergeCompletedMilestone(repo, "M011"); + + assert.equal(result.success, false, "dirty overlap should block branch-mode recovery"); + assert.match( + result.error ?? "", + /checkout|overwritten|untracked|would be overwritten/i, + "error should explain that checkout/dirty root state blocked recovery", + ); + + const subjects = run("git log --format=%s", repo); + assert.ok( + !subjects.includes("chore: auto-commit before milestone merge"), + "recovery must not auto-commit project-root overlap to main", + ); + assert.equal(run("git branch --show-current", repo), "main"); + assert.equal(run("git branch --list milestone/M011", repo).trim(), "milestone/M011"); + assert.equal(run("git status --short -- index.html", repo), "?? index.html"); + } finally { + process.chdir(savedCwd); + try { run("git reset --hard HEAD", repo); } catch { /* */ } + cleanup(repo); + } +}); + test("mergeCompletedMilestone ã clean merge, session status cleaned up", async () => { const savedCwd = process.cwd(); const repo = createTempRepo(); ```
